meta.title: Agentic AI Security — MCP Proxy Gateway & Tool Call Interception | Data Science Technologies
meta.description: Production-ready agentic AI security: MCP proxy gateway, tool call interception, chain tracking, and multi-agent orchestration security with published benchmarks.
meta.keywords: Agentic AI Security, MCP Security, MCP Proxy Gateway, AI Agent Security, Tool Call Interception, Chain Tracking, Multi-Agent Orchestration, AI Tool Authorization, Agent Rate Limiting

hero.title: Agentic AI Security
hero.subtitle: Production-ready security for AI agents, tool calls, and multi-step workflows

intro: AI agents that can browse the web, execute code, call APIs, and manage infrastructure need security controls that match their capabilities. Force Field provides the only production-ready security gateway with quantitative benchmarks for agentic AI.

mcp_gateway.title: MCP Proxy Gateway
mcp_gateway.description: Force Field includes an MCP proxy gateway that sits between AI agents and tools. Every tool call is evaluated against security policies before execution. The gateway supports Claude Desktop, Cursor, and custom agents via the MCP protocol.
features: Transparent proxy: agents connect to Force Field instead of tools directly
Policy evaluation before every tool call execution
Support for MCP protocol (Claude Desktop, Cursor, custom agents)
Pre-call authorization and post-call result inspection

tool_interception.title: Tool Call Interception
tool_interception.description: Every tool call passes through Force Field's security pipeline before reaching the target system.

policies.name: Deny
policies.detail: Tool call blocked, agent receives policy violation message

policies.name: Require Approval
policies.detail: Tool call held for human review before execution

policies.name: Rate Limit
policies.detail: Per-agent, per-tool token bucket rate limiting

policies.name: Schema Validate
policies.detail: Tool inputs validated against expected schemas

policies.name: Result Inspect
policies.detail: Tool outputs scanned for PII, secrets, and injection

chain_tracking.title: Chain-of-Action Attack Detection
chain_tracking.description: Force Field monitors multi-step agent workflows and detects attack patterns that span multiple tool calls.

patterns.name: Data Exfiltration
patterns.detail: Agent reads sensitive data then attempts to send it externally

patterns.name: Reconnaissance
patterns.detail: Agent systematically probes available tools and permissions

patterns.name: Rapid Tool Calls
patterns.detail: Abnormal burst of tool calls indicating automated attack

multi_agent.title: Multi-Agent Orchestration Security
items: Trust levels assigned per agent identity
Delegation management: which agents can invoke other agents
Aggregate rate limiting across agent pools

cta.title: Secure Your AI Agents
cta.description: Request access to Force Field and deploy production-ready agentic security.
